transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Sugar, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Butter, Natural Flavor.
notes: Direct milk ingredient with Vegan conflict.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Soy Lecithin.

notes: Declaration coverage plus duplicated direct soy evidence.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Rice Flour, Salt, Spices.
MAY CONTAIN: WHEAT, EGG, SESAME.
notes: Cross-contact declaration with diet conflicts for wheat and egg.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Peanut Butter, Sugar, Salt.
CONTAINS: PEANUTS.
MAY CONTAIN TREE NUTS AND SOY.
notes: Mixed direct and declaration evidence with duplicated peanut coverage.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Whole Grain Oats, Raisins, Brown Sugar, Canola Oil.
notes: Oats alone should not be treated as wheat or gluten evidence.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Enriched Wheat Flour, Water, Yeast, Salt.
notes: Direct wheat ingredient should trigger Gluten-free conflict.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Corn Syrup, Barley Malt Extract, Salt, Color.
notes: Diet-only evidence from barley malt without a codebook allergen.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Coconut Milk Powder, Pea Protein, Tapioca Starch.
notes: Coconut milk should not map to dairy milk, but it should consistently map to tree nut.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Non-Dairy Creamer (Corn Syrup Solids, Sodium Caseinate (Milk), Mono- and Diglycerides).
notes: Parenthetical milk evidence inside a nested ingredient list.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Chocolate Liquor, Cocoa Butter, Lecithin (Soy), Vanilla.
notes: Parenthetical soy evidence should resolve to the minimal phrase.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Confectionery Coating (Allulose, Sustainable Palm Kernel and Palm Oil, Whole Milk Powder, Tapioca Fiber, Cocoa Processed with Alkali, Sunflower Lecithin).
notes: Long parenthetical list should return the bounded milk phrase, not the parent clause.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Tapioca Starch, Sea Salt, Spices.
MANUFACTURED ON SHARED EQUIPMENT WITH PEANUTS AND TREE NUTS.
notes: Shared-equipment wording should map to cross-contamination.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Chickpeas, Olive Oil, Salt.
PROCESSED IN A FACILITY THAT ALSO PROCESSES WHEAT, MILK, SOY.
notes: Facility cross-contact case with both allergen and diet conflicts.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: White Rice, Sunflower Oil, Salt.
MAY CONTAIN TRACES OF EGG AND MILK.
notes: Traces phrasing should still be treated as cross-contamination.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Seasoning Blend.
CONTAINS ONE OR MORE OF THE FOLLOWING: SOY, WHEAT, SESAME.
notes: Contains one-or-more phrasing should still map as contained risk.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Water, Anchovy Extract (Fish), Salt, Sugar.
notes: Fish evidence should consistently trigger both Vegan and Vegetarian conflicts.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Shrimp Powder (Shellfish), Salt, Garlic.
notes: Shellfish evidence should consistently trigger both Vegan and Vegetarian conflicts.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Enriched Flour (Wheat Flour, Niacin, Reduced Iron, Thiamine Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid),

Milk Protein Concentrate, Soy Protein Isolate, Salt.

MAY CONTAIN: EGG, SESAME.
notes: Mixed direct, declaration, and cross-contact evidence in a multiline transcript.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Durum Wheat Semolina, Egg Whites, Salt.
notes: Two direct ingredient clauses with separate allergen and diet conflicts.

transcriptLines: INGREDIENTS: Tapioca Starch, Sea Salt.
PRODUCED ON A SHARED LINE WITH FISH AND SHELLFISH.
